I’m super surprised that this museum isn’t on Trip Advisor - so I added it. I’ve never done this before. But I had to I was greeted so warmly as soon as I walked in the history and the positivity and this museum was epic. The only thing that makes me sad is that their website is not up to spec when it comes to making a donation. I tried three times and I couldn’t make a donation. No one knew why that was the case but they said that they would speak to somebody about that. I hope so. I’d like to be able to return to Oakland and see it thrive even more.
